text:
(also known as Evangelion Prime 01) is a toy based on the Evangelion Test Type-01. It was made as part of the EVANGELION 30th Anniversary x Transformers collaboration. The figure was developed by TAKARA TOMY as part of SYNERGENEX series. https://www.takaratomy.co.jp/products/tsparkofficial/synergenex/tf_eva/ 

Profile

Official name:
It has two modes, robot mode and vehicle mode:
In the robot mode, the shape of the shoulder weapon rack is reproduced. The chest design is based on the Evangelion Unit-01. The abdomen retains the grill design of Optimus Prime, but is arranged in the V-shape of the abdomen of the Unit-01. The foot part has the characteristic orange sole of Unit-01 and a green cover.

It can transform into the vehicle mode, which is colored in the characteristic purple, green, and black of Evangelion Unit-01.
The left side features the Autobot mark, which symbolizes Transformers, and the right side features the NERV mark, which symbolizes Evangelion.

It also posses the , it is located in the chest, which has fused with the familiar "core" from Evangelion. The Core Matrix on the chest can be removed and held in the hands or attached into the base.

There is a face change function, overall the face design is based on Optimus Prime's head, incorporating the distinctive horns, cheek armor, and chin shape of Unit-01. The face change function allows you to change from mask on mode to mask off mode. With the mask off, the distinctive Evangelion mouth shape is revealed.
By opening it, it is possible to create the Berserk mode.

Weapons

1x 
2x 
1x 

History

Development

It was revealed as part of the inaugural T-SPARK LIVE streaming event on 25 September 2025, "Evangelion Prime Unit-01" is a retool of TAKARA TOMY's ' "Legendary Optimus Prime" (2018) in commemoration of the 30th anniversary of EVANGELION series. 

The toy has been retooled to have a new chest, pelvis, biceps, head, and—replacing the original's shoulder pads and changed into shoulder pylons, all to evoke Evangelion Unit-01. The toy's face-swapping gimmick has been retained, now with one face resembling the standard Unit-01 and the other face designed to evoke it in its berserk mode.

The original toy's Ion Blaster accessory is slightly retooled to better ressemble the EM-226 Evangelion Portable Revolving Multi-Barrel Machine Gun. In addition to that, Evangelion Prime Unit-01 comes with a Core Matrix, 1x Ion Gatling Blaster, 2x Progressive Energy Knives, 1x Axe of Cassius, 1x rack of 5mm ports so that all his accessories can store on his back in robot mode. https://tfwiki.net/wiki/Optimus_Prime_(G1)/toys#Evangelion_.C3.97_Transformers 

The toy is scheduled to ship in late August 2026, with a suggested retail price of ¥11000.
